calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Default Judgment Against Defendant Baseline Construction, Inc.
Off Calendar Dec-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Baseline Construction, Inc. and Yaniv Shlomo.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Marc Stimpert, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Robert L. Garcia, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Baseline Construction, Inc. or Yaniv Shlomo.
Plaintiffs' complaint for breach of contract was filed on February 21, 2018, with substitute service effectuated on defendants Baseline Construction, Inc. and Yaniv Shlomo on March 5, 2018. (Summons & Complaint were mailed on February 23, 2018).
Defaults as to defendants Baseline Construction, Inc. and Yaniv Shlomo were entered on May 14, 2018.
DOES 1-20 were dismissed on September 28, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Robert L. Garcia and Catalina P. de Garcia, and against the Defaulted Defendants Baseline Construction, Inc. and Yaniv Shlomo, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $724,089.00.
Costs - $731.78.
Stearman Costs - $2,500.00.

Total - $727,320.78.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Default Judgment Against Defendant Baseline Construction, Inc.
Off Calendar Nov-05-2018 Continued To Dec-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
